meta.title: How a teenager in a Cessna helped topple the Soviet Union
meta.description:
In 1987, a politically minded German teenager decide to throw caution to the wind and fly his rented Cessna 172 directly into the heart of the Soviet capital. Moscow, at the time, was likely the most heavily defended airspace on the planet. 

Despite the odds, he survived the ordeal and helped bring about the largest turnover of Soviet military officers in fifty years, giving Gorbachev the chance he needed to remove large swaths of his opposition. 

Special thanks to Cessna and CGFlying on YouTube (link below) for use of their promotional Cessna 172 footage.

CGFlying: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCc-UJrqDh63UoPx9dmI9UbQ
